hotels.name: The DeSoto Savannah
features: On-site restaurant & bar – 1540 Room and Edgar's Proof & Provision
Valet parking $42 per car, per night (subject to change)
concessions: Complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized)
Group rates honored one (1) day before and one (1) day after official block dates
contracting_options: Hotel can offer 10 rooms per night on a courtesy agreement
Courtesy Agreement - NO financial responsibility to client
hotels.cutoff_date: 30 days prior to arrival, by September 9, 2026

hotels.name: Hyatt Regency Savannah
features: On-site restaurant – Moss + Oak Savannah Eatery
Valet parking $40 per night (subject to change)
concessions: Complimentary gift bag distribution at the front desk (non-personalized)
contracting_options: 80% Attrition - Client financially responsible for 80% of the contracted room block
Minimum of 10 rooms contracted per night required to qualify for a room block
Credit card authorization form is needed at signing of contract
hotels.cutoff_date: 45 days prior to arrival, by August 25, 2026
